posts.text:
BREAKING: US and Israeli strikes on Iran are intensifying and spreading, hitting Shiraz, Lamerd Airport, Isfahan, Karaj, Bandar Abbas, and now Mashhad and Taybad, reports Al Jazeera’s Mohamed Vall.

🔴 LIVE updates: https://aje.news/z06h9e
posts.author: zerohedge

posts.text: America has no easy way to reopen the Strait of Hormuz. But Iran may not be able to force Donald Trump to end the war by keeping it shut https://www.economist.com/middle-east-and-africa/2026/03/15/the-iran-war-may-be-about-to-escalate?taid=69c4c204c8c42500014dcef9&utm_campaign=editorial-social&utm_content=discovery.content&utm_medium=social-media.content.np&utm_source=twitter

posts.text:
BREAKING: Over 500 gas stations in Australia have now  run out of fuel as the nation’s fuel crisis worsens.

Of these, 187 have completely run out of diesel, while 32 service stations had run out of all types of fuel.
posts.author: KobeissiLetter

posts.text: $foxt cashed up, will drill and 43-101 up some interesting Tungsten results.   Timing perfect
